sourcesContent:
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Calendar, Users, Zap, Camera } from 'lucide-react'; const categories = [ { id: 'professional', label: 'Professional Development', icon: Calendar, accent: '#001F5B', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #001F5B 0%, #0a2a5e 100%)', lightBg: '#f0f4ff', why: 'We invest in our members\' careers because we know the path for Hispanic professionals can come with extra obstacles. These events are designed to give you tools, exposure, and connections that move the needle.', events: [ { name: 'SHPEtinas Conference', icon: '👩‍💼', description: 'An empowering conference dedicated to Latina engineers and professionals — featuring keynotes, workshops, and networking to celebrate and elevate Latinas in STEM.' }, { name: 'Regional Leadership Forums', icon: '🏛️', description: 'Collaborative gatherings with SHPE chapters across the region to share best practices, align on initiatives, and grow as leaders within the organization.' }, { name: 'National Conference', icon: '✈️', description: 'The largest gathering of Hispanic STEM professionals in the nation. Members connect with Fortune 500 recruiters, attend technical sessions, and compete in national competitions.' }, { name: 'Professional Outings', icon: '🏢', description: 'Visits to company headquarters, innovation labs, and professional spaces to give members a behind-the-scenes look at where their career could take them.' }, { name: 'And More…', icon: '➕', description: 'From resume workshops to mock interviews and lunch-and-learns, we are always adding new opportunities to help members grow professionally.' }, ], }, { id: 'networking', label: 'Networking', icon: Users, accent: '#0070C0', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0070C0 0%, #005a9e 100%)', lightBg: '#f0f8ff', why: 'Your network is your net worth. We create spaces where genuine connections happen — with peers, mentors, and industry leaders who want to see you succeed.', events: [ { name: 'Happy Hours', icon: '🥂', description: 'Casual after-work get-togethers where members unwind, meet new faces, and build friendships that go beyond the professional setting.' }, { name: 'White Elephant — December', icon: '🎁', description: 'Our beloved holiday tradition. A fun gift exchange that brings the SHPE Austin familia together to celebrate the year and each other.' }, { name: 'Joint Events with SWE, WTS & Others', icon: '🤝', description: 'Collaborative events with other local professional organizations like the Society of Women Engineers and Women in Transportation Society — expanding your network across disciplines.' }, { name: 'And More…', icon: '➕', description: 'Speed networking nights, industry mixers, and partner events are always in the pipeline. Follow us on social media to stay in the loop.' }, ], }, { id: 'activities', label: 'Activities', icon: Zap, accent: '#D33A02', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #D33A02 0%, #a82d01 100%)', lightBg: '#fff4f0', why: 'Community is more than career talk. We play, volunteer, and adventure together because the strongest professional bonds are built outside the office.', events: [ { name: 'Volleyball', icon: '🏐', description: 'Friendly volleyball games open to all skill levels. A great way to stay active, meet members you might not cross paths with at professional events, and have fun.' }, { name: 'Soccer Competitions', icon: '⚽', description: 'Competitive and recreational soccer matches that bring out everyone\'s competitive side and channel that SHPE team spirit onto the field.' }, { name: 'Tubing', icon: '🛶', description: 'Austin\'s rivers are our playground. We organize group tubing trips so members can disconnect, recharge, and bond in true Texas fashion.' }, { name: 'Volunteering', icon: '🧥', description: 'Giving back is core to who we are. We partner with local drives like Coats for Kids and other community initiatives to make a tangible impact in Austin.' }, { name: 'And More…', icon: '➕', description: 'Escape rooms, food tours, game nights — if it sounds fun, we\'ve probably done it or are planning it. Members always have a say in what\'s next.' }, ], }, ]; const fadeUp = { initial: { opacity: 0, y: 40 }, whileInView: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, viewport: { once: true }, transition: { duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }, }; export default function Events() { return (
{/* ── HERO ── */}
SHPE Austin

Events

From career-defining conferences to soccer games and holiday parties — SHPE Austin events are where the community comes alive. There is something here for every member.

{[ { value: '3', label: 'Event Categories' }, { value: '15+', label: 'Annual Events' }, { value: '100%', label: 'Open to Members' }, ].map((s) => (

{s.value}

{s.label}

))}
{/* ── EVENT CATEGORIES ── */} {categories.map((cat, catIdx) => { const Icon = cat.icon; const isEven = catIdx % 2 === 0; return (

{cat.label}

{cat.why}
{cat.events.map((ev) => (
{ev.icon}

{ev.name}

{ev.description}

))}
); })} {/* ── PHOTO GALLERY PLACEHOLDER ── */}

Photos of Previous Events

{/* ── JOIN CTA ── */}
Get Involved

Ready to be part of something bigger?

All of these events are open to SHPE Austin members. Membership gives you access to every event, every program, and most importantly — the entire familia. Join us today.

Become a Member
